summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CrediControl SaaS loan management system. Backend APIs working excellently (94.7% success rate). Frontend authentication and navigation improved significantly but session persistence issues still prevent full workflow testing.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Session cookies remain valid after logout
flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor security concern - sessions not properly invalidated

integration_issues.issue: User sessions are not persisting consistently - users get redirected to login page during navigation between pages

passed_tests: Application loads correctly with beautiful dark theme
Admin login with emersonthiago257@gmail.com works and redirects to /admin
Admin dashboard shows correct statistics (4 users)
Admin can view users list in /admin/users with proper data
Admin can block/unblock users functionality available
User login with joao@teste.com works and redirects to /dashboard
User dashboard loads with financial metrics
User can navigate to /customers page and see customer management interface
User can navigate to /loans page and see loan management interface
Access separation works correctly (admin blocked from user routes, user blocked from admin routes)
Logout functionality works and redirects to login
Backend API endpoints work correctly (18/19 tests passed)
Customer CRUD operations work via API
Loan creation with automatic interest calculation works
Installment generation and payment registration work
HTTPS cookies with secure=true and samesite=none working

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (login, dashboard, navigation work but session persistence prevents full workflow testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue during navigation. Users can login successfully but get redirected to login page during navigation between pages (customers, loans, dashboard). This prevents full testing of customer creation, loan creation, and payment workflows. The issue appears to be related to cookie handling or session expiration during page transitions.
